metadata.title: Premium Essential Oil Products | Kodai Global Exports
metadata.description: Explore our range of export-grade essential oils including premium Lemongrass Oil (75-85% citral) and Eucalyptus Oil (70-80% cineole). Steam-distilled, quality-tested, and export-ready with FSSAI certification.
